calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Respondent, Plaintiff Maya Leviten, is present. Dahna Stephanie Pasternak, Esq., is present on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff.

Appellant, Defendant 600 South Van Ness LLC, represented by Ross Schomaker, is present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Dahna Stephanie Pasternak, Esq., appears on behalf of Respondent, Plaintiff Maya Leviten. Respondent, Plaintiff Maya Leviten, testifies as a witness. No additional evidence is introduced and/or submitted.

Appellant, Defendant 600 South Van Ness LLC, represented by Ross Schomaker, testifies on his own behalf. No additional evidence is introduced and/or submitted.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission. Plaintiff's exhibits retained.

Judge: Honorable Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: C. Cheng; Reporter: Not Reported; Bailiff: Not Assigned. (611)
